name: Exorcism simulator (RPG)
description:
The Rpg takes place in the Phillipines, one of the biggest Christian countries in the world. Demons are right now terrorizing this country after a massive sinkhole was opened in the province of Palawan, which caused the "great hellspawn release" incident. After that incident, the government of the Philippines weaponized Christianity in order to protect humanity from the demons and stop them from wreaking havoc. These demons can be vanished by using bible artifacts, prayers, holy water, and more.

The power system in this RPG is very simple, it is called the "holy spirit". This power system allows you to fight against the opposing hell spawn without that much struggle. You can obtain this power system by becoming a pure christianized person that trust god will all your will and heart. You can asks some priests or nuns to teach you how to use the holy spirit. Learning how to use this power system is very hard, you have to go through some intense trainings and exercises, not only that, but learning some bible studies is required. Once you are fully trained to use it, you are now able to sense the presence of the nearby demonic figures. Whenever you do a sign of the cross, you will release a transparent golden glowing aura that is only visible to all Christians or Catholics. Once you have this aura activated, it means that your holy spirit is activated and ready to be used against the devils.

Note: devils can be anywhere and they are disguised as ordinary things. They can either be possessing a poor person or lurking in the dark.
creator: GeorgieIsAnAsshole24
